name: Lockfile Sync Check
description: When package.json is edited, verify the lockfile is in sync and prompt to run install if needed

then.prompt: package.json was just edited. Check whether the lockfile (package-lock.json or yarn.lock or pnpm-lock.yaml) is still in sync with the updated package.json. If dependencies were added, removed, or version-changed, remind the user to run the appropriate install command (npm install, yarn install, or pnpm install) to update the lockfile. Do not run the install command automatically — just alert the user if it is needed.
